message: Evaluating 1 prediction(s) (local Couchbase subset; 547 total local questions in gold).
[local272] Result mismatch (multi-gold): pred(5r x 4c) vs 2 gold files [(5, 4), (4, 4)]
query:
WITH order_lines AS (
    SELECT
        ol.product_id,
        ol.qty,
        SUM(ol.qty) OVER (PARTITION BY ol.product_id ORDER BY ol.id) AS cum_qty
    FROM `oracle_sql`.`oracle_sql_scope`.`orderlines` ol
    WHERE ol.order_id = 423
),
inv_ranked AS (
    SELECT
        i.product_id,
        i.id AS inv_id,
        l.aisle,
        l.position,
        i.qty AS available_qty,
        p.purchased,
        SUM(i.qty) OVER (PARTITION BY i.product_id ORDER BY p.purchased, i.qty, i.id) AS cum_inv
    FROM `oracle_sql`.`oracle_sql_scope`.`inventory` i
    JOIN `oracle_sql`.`oracle_sql_scope`.`locations` l ON i.location_id = l.id
    JOIN `oracle_sql`.`oracle_sql_scope`.`purchases` p ON i.purchase_id = p.id
    WHERE l.warehouse = 1
),
order_needed AS (
    SELECT product_id, MAX(cum_qty) AS total_needed
    FROM order_lines
    GROUP BY product_id
),
picks AS (
    SELECT
        ir.product_id,
        ir.aisle,
        TOSTRING(ir.position) AS position,
        GREATEST(0,
            LEAST(ir.cum_inv, on2.total_needed) -
            (ir.cum_inv - ir.available_qty)
        ) AS QUANTITY_TO_PICK
    FROM inv_ranked ir
    JOIN order_needed on2 ON ir.product_id = on2.product_id
    WHERE ir.cum_inv - ir.available_qty < on2.total_needed
)
SELECT product_id, aisle, position, QUANTITY_TO_PICK
FROM picks
WHERE QUANTITY_TO_PICK > 0
ORDER BY product_id, aisle, position;
